context: Agent Capability Plane detail for the seven-plane operating system. Covers agent catalog, skill composition, assignment, evaluation, and feedback loops.

sections.content: Agent Capability Plane owns agent catalog, skill composition, assignment, evaluation, and feedback loops. Agent Capability Plane decides which agent shape should handle which work.
Must_not = raw runtime lifecycle or operator registry truth. Current posture = required-unassigned. Future implementation should stay distinct from Control Plane and Harness Runtime Plane.

changelog.delta: Initial seven-plane pilot module for Agent Capability Plane.
